standard.name: Standard Die
standard.description: Standard die carved from ivory, used in roadside games of Wanderer's Dice.

weighted.name: Weighted Die
weighted.description: A die carved from uneven bone, meant for games of chance. Weighted so high-rolls are more frequent.

circus.name: Circus Die
circus.description: A peculiar periwinkle die used for games of chance, that sounds like it has a bell inside. Several of its faces show Jokers in eerie circus masks.

bertunia.name: Bertunia Die
bertunia.description: A variant die used in Bertunia Castle Town. Includes a face for the Knight, arm extended to form a 7, and the Rogue, crouched and bunched up to form a 0.

lantern.name: Lantern Die
lantern.description: A glowing die used in certain variants of Wanderer's Dice. Includes the face of the Bridge - which is able to bridge the climb from high to low sequences.

crown.name: Crown Die
crown.description: A golden jewel-encrusted die. Includes the face of the Crown - which is able to crown any hand to raise its standing.
